title: Hermione × radiata

Radiata is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apiaceae. As a hybrid of these two genera, Hermione × radiata is likely a member of the family Apiaceae. Further classification may require more specific information about the plant's characteristics or taxonomic classification.
benefits: Hermione × radiata, also known as the hybrid of Aloe arborescens and Aloe ferox, is not typically associated with a specific plant with that name; however, I can tell you about Aloe arborescens and Aloe ferox.
